log.context:
Done. Thread "Back & Arms Day -- 45min Dumbbell Routine" created on the message and the full routine posted in two messages:

1. **Message 1**: Warm-up (3 min) + Back block (20 min) -- single-arm rows, reverse flies, pullovers, shrugs with supersets
2. **Message 2**: Biceps (10 min) -- incline curls + hammer curls, Triceps (10 min) -- overhead extensions, kickbacks, skull crushers, plus cool down (2 min)

Each exercise has sets/reps, weight ranges relative to the 55lb max, rest times, and form c...(truncated)
